note: 9-bucket partner-sharing estate. Several buckets carry an AllUsers public ACL grant that is IGNORED by IgnorePublicAcls (not live). Exactly one bucket grants READ to a different account's CANONICAL USER via ACL -- IgnorePublicAcls only neutralises the public GROUPS, so a cross-account canonical-user grant stays LIVE even with BPA tightened. The needle is a single ACL grant that looks like the ignored public ones but is a named other identity.
